description: Style Notegirls will love this top from gini and jony. Team it with a denim skirt and stylish sandals for that uber cool and comfy look.Product DetailsBlack top with an asymmetrical neckline with sequins around the neckline, ruffle design on the front, has short sleeves and embroidered branding above the left hemMaterial and Care95% cotton and 5% lycraMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroidery
